# Sieving Analysis

**Summary**: A physical method to determine the distribution of grain sizes in a soil sample.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-armoh|Armoh, 2016]] applied sieve analysis to characterize the texture and sorting of sabkha soil.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The sabkha soil was determined to be primarily sand with a mean phi value of 1.77 and a standard deviation of 1.1 (poorly sorted). ([[2016-armoh|Armoh, 2016, p. 51]])
